title: Autohopper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''autohopper''' was a type of automated self-propelled transport vehicle which traveled on preprogramed courses. They were routed by a [[central instruction processor]] (CIP). Autohoppers were used on [[Danuta]], among other places, and an autohopper with governmental markings was parked in the [[Trid spaceport]], next to the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]''. Until [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], they were used by the dictatorial government of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan]] as listening and recording devices as a means of effectively spying on the planet's population.

{{Veh-stub}}
